queries.prompt: I’m looking into the history of drug regulation and need to know when the Kefauver‑Harris Amendments were passed to make randomized controlled trials the standard for evaluating clinical efficacy. Could you tell me the year and point me to the part of the FDA documents where this is mentioned?
I’m looking for the listed price of the new oncology drug discussed in the NASEUA workshop presentation. Can you tell me what it is?

In the FDA slide deck AAMGRxBiosimsSept2018_UHL.pdf, could you explain what factors contributed to the reduction in Refuse to Receive rates for ANDAs under GDUFA II compared to GDUFA I? Please reference the relevant parts of the document.

Can you tell me how changes to the FDA’s 503B bulk substances list affect the availability of compounded medications for patients? Please provide a concise answer and cite the specific documents you used.
Could you let me know what the regulatory affairs team decided about the updated vaccine labeling in their most recent internal meeting?
